name: Spaghetti Florentine
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw and drain the frozen spinach.
2. Cook the spaghetti until done.
3. Combine the sauce and spaghetti, tossing lightly.
4. Mix together the cottage cheese and 1/4 cup of parmesan cheese.
5. Place half of the spaghetti mixture in a 10" x 6-inch baking dish.
6. Cover with the spinach, cottage cheese, and half of the mozzarella cheese.
7. Top with the remaining spaghetti mixture.
8. Cut the remaining mozzarella into 1/2-inch strips and arrange them to form a lattice design.
9. Sprinkle with the remaining parmesan cheese.
10. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
